claims.claim: Deepgram connect query writes encoding, channels, multichannel, sample_rate(=self.sample_rate)
Rapida opens live socket SampleRate:16000, Channels:1
Base STT sets self._sample_rate = self._init_sample_rate or frame.audio_in_sample_rate
OpenAI STT resamples each chunk via resampler.resample(audio, self.sample_rate, OPENAI_SAMPLE_RATE)
OpenAI realtime path automatically resampled to 24 kHz
claims.found: docstring line 446: 'Automatically resampled to 24 kHz.'; OPENAI_SAMPLE_RATE = 24000 confirmed in _constants.py:9

claims.claim: OpenAI fixed model rate is 24 kHz
Soniox has sample_rate=16000 default at soniox/stt.py:119
claims.found: Line 119 is `return token["text"] == END_TOKEN or token["text"] == FINALIZED_TOKEN` (is_end_token). Soniox `sample_rate` param defaults to None (stt.py:267 `sample_rate: int | None = None`); no 16000 default exists anywhere in the file (grep for 16000 returns nothing).
claims.correction: remove the soniox sample_rate=16000 claim; Soniox sample_rate default is None, not 16000, and stt.py:119 is is_end_token not a rate

claims.claim: Deepgram ebook: telephony 8 kHz mono mu-law/A-law PCM, browsers/mobile 16 or 48 kHz PCM
claims.found: 'Telephony typically uses 8 kHz mono µ-law or A-law PCM, while browsers and mobile devices commonly support 16 or 48 kHz PCM.'

claims.claim: Telephony mu-law decode/resample happens in serializer layer, not STT plugin
claims.found: Consistent with pipecat AGENTS.md: 'Telephony serializers (Twilio, Plivo, ...) handle provider-specific protocols and audio encoding (e.g., µ-law)'; Deepgram/Rapida plugins declare sample_rate and do not resample in-plugin (verified no resample call in deepgram/stt.py connect path).

summary: 10 of 11 assertions SUPPORTED against ground truth. One WRONG: the Soniox claim (sample_rate=16000 default at soniox/stt.py:119) is false on both line and value — line 119 is is_end_token, and Soniox's sample_rate defaults to None (stt.py:267), with no 16000 anywhere in the file. All other code_refs (deepgram/stt.py:300,569-572; deepgram.go:21-23,51-66; stt_service.py:303; openai/stt.py:446,609; OPENAI_SAMPLE_RATE=24000) and the deepgram-ebook quote verified exactly.
